stemHtml:
Which items are correct as regards Standard Operating Procedures?

1. SOPs must NOT be performed from memory, in order to avoid omissions.
2. SOPs are performed as skill-based and rule-based behaviours.
3. SOPs that are frequently amended are more likely to be correctly executed than SOPs that remain unchanged.
4. There is a higher risk of error due to reversion to previous habits when a pilot executes a recently modified SOP.
